verses.geez:
ወአበሱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ አበሳ ፡ ወነሥኡ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዘአሕረሙ ፡ ወነሥአ ፡ አካን ፡ ወልደ ፡ ከርሚ
                  ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዝንብሪ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዛራ ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዘአሕረሙ ፡ ወተምዕዐ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ላዕለ
                  ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: But the children of Israel committed a great trespass, and purloined part of the accursed thing; and Achar the son of Charmi, the son of Zambri, the son of Zara, of the tribe of Juda, took of the accursed thing; and the Lord was very angry with the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: But the children of Israel committed a trespass in the accursed thing: for Achan, the son of Carmi, the son of Zabdi, the son of Zerah, of the tribe of Judah, took of the accursed thing: and the anger of the LORD was kindled against the children of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወፈነወ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ዕደወ ፡ እምነ ፡ ኢያሪኮ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጋይ ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ቤቴል ፡ መንገለ ፡ ጽባሒሃ ፡
                  ለቤቴል ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይብል ፡ ዕረጉ ፡ ወርእይዋ ፡ ለጋይ ፡ ወዐርጉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ወርእይዋ ፡ ለጋይ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua sent men to Gai, which is by Bæthel, saying, Spy out Gai: and the men went up and spied Gai.
translations.kjv: And Joshua sent men from Jericho to Ai, which is beside Bethaven, on the east side of Bethel, and spake unto them, saying, Go up and view the country.  And the men went up and viewed Ai.

verses.geez:
ወገብኡ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ኢይዕረግ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ አላ ፡ ዕሥራ ፡ ምእት ፡ አው ፡ ሠላሳ ፡ ምእት ፡
                  ዕደው ፡ ይዕረጉ ፡ ወይትቃተልዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወኵሎሰ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ኢትሰድ ፡ ህየ ፡ እስመ ፡ ውሑዳን ፡ እሙንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And they returned to Joshua, and said to him, Let not all the people go up, but let about two or three thousand men go up and take the city by siege: carry not up thither the whole people, for the enemy are few.
translations.kjv: And they returned to Joshua, and said unto him, Let not all the people go up; but let about two or three thousand men go up and smite Ai; and make not all the people to labour thither; for they are but few.

verses.geez:
ወዐርጉ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ የአክሉ ፡ ሠላሳ ፡ ምእት ፡ ወአንትዕዎሙ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ወጐዩ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጾሙ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And there went up about three thousand men, and they fled from before the men of Gai.
translations.kjv: So there went up thither of the people about three thousand men: and they fled before the men of Ai.

verses.geez:
ወቀተሉ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ሠላሳ ፡ ወስድስተ ፡ ዕደወ ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ ዴገንዎሙ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ አንቀጽ ፡ እስከ
                  ፡ አጥፍእዎሙ ፡ ወቀተልዎሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ሙራድ ፡ ወደንገፀ ፡ ልቦሙ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ከመ ፡ ማይ ።

translations.lxx: And the men of Gai slew of them to the number of thirty-six men, and they pursued them from the gate, and destroyed them from the steep hill; and the heart of the people was alarmed and became as water.
translations.kjv: And the men of Ai smote of them about thirty and six men: for they chased them from before the gate even unto Shebarim, and smote them in the going down: wherefore the hearts of the people melted, and became as water.

verses.geez:
ወሠጠጠ ፡ አልባሲሁ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወወድቀ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ በገጹ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ታቦቱ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡
                  እስከ ፡ ሰርክ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወሊቃናቲሆሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወወደዩ ፡ መሬተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርእሶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua tore his garments; and Joshua fell on the earth on his face before the Lord until evening, he and the elders of Israel; and they cast dust on their heads.
translations.kjv: And Joshua rent his clothes, and fell to the earth upon his face before the ark of the LORD until the eventide, he and the elders of Israel, and put dust upon their heads.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ገነይኩ ፡ ለከ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ ለምንት ፡ አዕድዎ ፡ አዕደዎሙ ፡ ገብርከ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ
                  ፡ እምነ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ከመ ፡ ታግብኦሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሆሙ ፡ ለአሞሬዎን ፡ ወከመ ፡ ታጥፍአነ ፤ ሶበ ፡ ኀደርነ ፡ ወነበርነ
                  ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua said, I pray, Lord, wherefore has thy servant brought this people over Jordan to deliver them to the Amorite to destroy us? would we had remained and settled ourselves beyond Jordan.
translations.kjv: And Joshua said, Alas, O LORD God, wherefore hast thou at all brought this people over Jordan, to deliver us into the hand of the Amorites, to destroy us? would to God we had been content, and dwelt on the other side Jordan!

verses.geez: እግዚኦ ፡ ወምንተ ፡ እንከ ፡ እብል ፡ ናሁ ፡ ሜጠ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ዘባኖ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ፀሩ ።

translations.lxx: And what shall I say since Israel has turned his back before his enemy?
translations.kjv: O LORD, what shall I say, when Israel turneth their backs before their enemies!

verses.geez:
ወእምከመ ፡ ሰምዑ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ወኵሎሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ የዐግቱነ ፡ ወያጠፍኡነ ፡ እምነ ፡
                  ምድር ፡ ወምንተ ፡ ተሬሲ ፡ ለስምከ ፡ ዐቢይ ።

translations.lxx: And when the Chananite and all the inhabitants of the land hear it, they shall compass us round and destroy us from off the land: and what wilt thou do for thy great name?
translations.kjv: For the Canaanites and all the inhabitants of the land shall hear of it, and shall environ us round, and cut off our name from the earth: and what wilt thou do unto thy great name?

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ ተንሥእ ፡ ወለምንት ፡ ትወድቅ ፡ አንተ ፡ በገጽከ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Joshua, Rise up; why hast thou fallen upon thy face?
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Joshua, Get thee up; wherefore liest thou thus upon thy face?

verses.geez:
አበሱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ወክሕዱ ፡ በኪዳንየ ፡ ዘተካየድኩ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ወነሥኡ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዘሕሩም ፡ ወሰረቁ ፡ ወወደዩ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ንዋያቲሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: The people has sinned, and transgressed the covenant which I made with them; they have stolen from the cursed thing, and put it into their store.
translations.kjv: Israel hath sinned, and they have also transgressed my covenant which I commanded them: for they have even taken of the accursed thing, and have also stolen, and dissembled also, and they have put it even among their own stuff.

verses.geez:
ወኢይክሉ ፡ እንከ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ቀዊመ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ፀሮሙ ፡ ወይመይጡ ፡ ዘባናቲሆሙ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ፀሮሙ ፡ እስመ
                  ፡ ርጉማነ ፡ ኮኑ ፡ ወኢይደግም ፡ እንከ ፡ ሀልዎ ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ኢያውጻእክሙ ፡ እምኔክሙ ፡ ዘርጉም ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Israel will not be able to stand before their enemies; they will turn their back before their enemies, for they have become an accursed thing: I will not any longer be with you, unless ye remove the cursed thing from yourselves.
translations.kjv: Therefore the children of Israel could not stand before their enemies, but turned their backs before their enemies, because they were accursed: neither will I be with you any more, except ye destroy the accursed from among you.

verses.geez:
ወተንሥእ ፡ ቀድሶሙ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ ወያንጽሑ ፡ ርእሶሙ ፡ ለጌሠም ፡ እስመ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይቤ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላከ ፡
                  እስራኤል ፡ ዘሕሩምአ ፡ ሀለወአ ፡ ውስቴትክሙ ፡ ወኢትክሉ ፡ እንከ ፡ ቀዊመ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ፀርክሙ ፡ እስከ ፡ ታሴስሉ ፡
                  እምኔክሙአ ፡ ዘሕሩምአ ።

translations.lxx: Rise, sanctify the people and tell them to sanctify themselves for the morrow: thus says the Lord God of Israel, The accursed thing is among you; ye shall not be able to stand before your enemies, until ye shall have removed the cursed thing from among you.
translations.kjv: Up, sanctify the people, and say, Sanctify yourselves against to morrow: for thus saith the LORD God of Israel, There is an accursed thing in the midst of thee, O Israel: thou canst not stand before thine enemies, until ye take away the accursed thing from among you.

verses.geez:
ወይጊሡ ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ ወይትጋብኡ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ወሕዝብ ፡ እንተ ፡ አርአየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ [ላዕሌሃ
                  ፡] ለይትፋለጡ ፡ በበ ፡ ነገዶሙ ፡ ይቁሙ ፡ ወነገድ ፡ እንተ ፡ አርአየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ላዕሌሃ ፡ ለይትፋለጡ ፡ ወይቁሙ ፡
                  በበ ፡ ቤቶሙ ፡ ወቤት ፡ ዘአርአየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ላዕሌሃ ፡ ለይትፋለጡ ፡ ወለይቁሙ ፡ በበ ፡ ብእሲሁ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall all be gathered together by your tribes in the morning, and it shall come to pass that the tribe which the Lord shall shew, ye shall bring by families; and the family which the Lord shall shew, ye shall bring by households; and the household which the Lord shall shew, ye shall bring man by man.
translations.kjv: In the morning therefore ye shall be brought according to your tribes: and it shall be, that the tribe which the LORD taketh shall come according to the families thereof; and the family which the LORD shall take shall come by households; and the household which the LORD shall take shall come man by man.

verses.geez:
ወብእሲ ፡ ዘአርአየ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ ለያውዕይዎ ፡ በእሳት ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ዘዚአሁ ፡ እስመ ፡ ክሕደ ፡ በኪዳኑ ፡
                  ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወእስመ ፡ ገብረ ፡ ኀጢአተ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And the man who shall be pointed out, shall be burnt with fire, and all that he has; because he has transgressed the covenant of the Lord, and has wrought wickedness in Israel.
translations.kjv: And it shall be, that he that is taken with the accursed thing shall be burnt with fire, he and all that he hath: because he hath transgressed the covenant of the LORD, and because he hath wrought folly in Israel.

verses.geez: ወጌሠ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወአስተጋብኦሙ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ወአስተርአየ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ይሁዳ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua rose up early, and brought the people by their tribes; and the tribe of Juda was pointed out.
translations.kjv: So Joshua rose up early in the morning, and brought Israel by their tribes; and the tribe of Judah was taken:

verses.geez:
ወተፈልጡ ፡ በበ ፡ ነገዶሙ ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ ወአስተርአየ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ዛሪ ፡ ወተፈልጠ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ዛሪ ፡
                  በበ ፡ ቤቱ ፡ ወአስተርአየ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ዘንብሪ ።

translations.lxx: And it was brought by their families, and the family of the Zaraites was pointed out.
translations.kjv: And he brought the family of Judah; and he took the family of the Zarhites: and he brought the family of the Zarhites man by man; and Zabdi was taken:

verses.geez:
ወተፈልጠ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ዘንብሪ ፡ በበ ፡ ብእሲሁ ፡ ወአስተርአየ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አካን ፡ ወልደ ፡ ከርሚ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዛራ ፡
                  ዘእምነ ፡ ይሁዳ ።

translations.lxx: And it was brought man by man, and Achar the son of Zambri the son of Zara was pointed out.
translations.kjv: And he brought his household man by man; and Achan, the son of Carmi, the son of Zabdi, the son of Zerah, of the tribe of Judah, was taken.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ለአካን ፡ ወልድየ ፡ አእኵቶ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላከ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወእመኖ ፡ ወአይድዐኒ ፡
                  ምንተ ፡ ገበርከ ፡ ወኢትኅባእ ፡ እምኔየ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua said to Achar, Give glory this day to the Lord God of Israel, and make confession; and tell me what thou hast done, and hide it not from me.
translations.kjv: And Joshua said unto Achan, My son, give, I pray thee, glory to the LORD God of Israel, and make confession unto him; and tell me now what thou hast done; hide it not from me.

verses.geez:
ወአውሥኦ ፡ አካን ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ አማን ፡ አነ ፡ አበስኩ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላከ ፡ እስራኤል ፡
                  ከመዝ ፡ ወከመዝ ፡ ገበርኩ ።

translations.lxx: And Achar answered Joshua, and said, Indeed I have sinned against the Lord God of Israel: thus and thus have I done:
translations.kjv: And Achan answered Joshua, and said, Indeed I have sinned against the LORD God of Israel, and thus and thus have I done:

verses.geez:
ሶበ ፡ ርኢኩ ፡ በውስተ ፡ በርበር ፡ ልብሰ ፡ ዐሥቅ ፡ አሐደ ፡ ወክልኤ ፡ ምእተ ፡ (ጠፋልሐ ፡) ዲድረክመ ፡ ዘብሩር ፡
                  ወልሳን ፡ አሐቲ ፡ እንተ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ተአክል ፡ ፶ዲድረክመ ፡ ተውላጣ ፡ ፈተውኩ ፡ ወነሣእኩ ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ሀለወ ፡ ድፉን ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ደብተራየ ፡ ወጠፋልሐ ፡ ብሩርኒ ፡ ሀለወ ፡ ድፉን ፡ መትሕቱ ።

translations.lxx: I saw in the spoil an embroidered mantle, and two hundred didrachms of silver, and one golden wedge of fifty didrachms, and I desired them and took them; and, behold, they are hid in my tent, and the silver is hid under them.
translations.kjv: When I saw among the spoils a goodly Babylonish garment, and two hundred shekels of silver, and a wedge of gold of fifty shekels weight, then I coveted them, and took them; and, behold, they are hid in the earth in the midst of my tent, and the silver under it.

verses.geez:
ወፈነወ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ደቆ ፡ ወሮጹ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብተራሁ ፡ ወሀለወ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ድፉን ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ደብተራሁ ፡ ወብሩርኒ ፡ ሀለወ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ መትሕቶ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua sent messengers, and they ran to the tent into the camp; and these things were hidden in his tent, and the silver under them.
translations.kjv: So Joshua sent messengers, and they ran unto the tent; and, behold, it was hid in his tent, and the silver under it.

verses.geez:
ወአውፅኡ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደብተራሁ ፡ ወወሰዱ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወኀበ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሊቃናተ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወአንበሩ ፡
                  ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And they brought them out of the tent, and brought them to Joshua and the elders of Israel, and they laid them before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And they took them out of the midst of the tent, and brought them unto Joshua, and unto all the children of Israel, and laid them out before the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወነሥኦ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ለአካን ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዛራ ፡ ወለውእቱ ፡ ብሩር ፡ ወለውእቱ ፡ ልብስ ፡ ወለይእቲ ፡ ልሳን ፡ እንተ ፡
                  ወርቅ ፡ ወወሰዶሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቈላተ ፡ አኮር ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፡ ወለአዋልዲሁ ፡ ወለአልህምቲሁ ፡ ወለአባግዒሁ ፡ ወለአእዱጊሁ ፡
                  ወለደብተራሁ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ንዋዩ ፡ ወወሰዶሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኤሜቃኮር ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua took Achar the son of Zara, and brought him to the valley of Achor, and his sons, and his daughters, and his calves, and his asses, and all his sheep, and his tent, and all his property, and all the people were with him; and he brought them to Emec Achor.
translations.kjv: And Joshua, and all Israel with him, took Achan the son of Zerah, and the silver, and the garment, and the wedge of gold, and his sons, and his daughters, and his oxen, and his asses, and his sheep, and his tent, and all that he had: and they brought them unto the valley of Achor.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ለአካን ፡ ለምንት ፡ ሠሮከነ ፤ ለይሠሩከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በከመ ፡ ዮም ፡ ወወገርዎ ፡ በእብን ፡
                  ኵሎሙ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወአውዐይዎሙ ፡ በእሳት ፡ ወወገርዎሙ ፡ በእብን ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua said to Achar, Why hast thou destroyed us? the Lord destroy thee as at this day. And all Israel stoned him with stones.
translations.kjv: And Joshua said, Why hast thou troubled us? the LORD shall trouble thee this day. And all Israel stoned him with stones, and burned them with fire, after they had stoned them with stones.

verses.geez:
ወአቀሙ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ሐውልተ ፡ እንተ ፡ እብን ፡ እስከ ፡ ዮም ፡ ወእስከ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወአኅደገ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  መንሱተ ፡ መዐቱ ፡ ወበበይነ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሰመዮ ፡ ኤሜቃኮር ፡ እስከ ፡ ዮም ፡ ወእስከ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ።

translations.lxx: And they set up over him a great heap of stones; and the Lord ceased from his fierce anger. Therefore he called the place Emecachor until this day.
translations.kjv: And they raised over him a great heap of stones unto this day. So the LORD turned from the fierceness of his anger. Wherefore the name of that place was called, The valley of Achor, unto this day.
